summary: A biographical overview of Diane Hendricks, co-founder of ABC Supply, detailing her rise from a Wisconsin dairy farm to building a $22 billion roofing and building materials empire. The article highlights her focus on customer relationships, strategic acquisitions, and philanthropic investments in vocational education and local economic revitalization.

principles.statement: Business success and social responsibility are interconnected.
principles.rationale: Investing in local communities and vocational education empowers people and drives broader economic development.

principles.statement: Differentiate your business through personal relationships and superior customer service.
principles.rationale: When entering a competitive market dominated by larger firms, focusing on reliability and building personal relationships with contractors is the key to standing out and growing.

signature_quotes.text: To all of you aspiring entrepreneurs out there, if I can make it you can make it too.
signature_quotes.context: Addressed to aspiring entrepreneurs, reflecting on her journey from a rural dairy farm to building a multi-billion dollar enterprise.
